messages.content: which statements describe characteristics of more developed countries (MDC)S? A. greater access to health care B. increased reliance on agriculture C. reduced educational opportunities D. greater access to transportation and communication E. higher standard of living F. shorter life expectancy G. more industry (SELECT ALL THAT APPLY)

A. greater access to health care
D. greater access to transportation and communication
E. higher standard of living
G. more industry
the process of transforming of land from green to desert is called
Desertification

which statements describe ecosystems? A. the parts of an ecosystem are independent and have little to do with each other B. people's actions sometimes improve the health of an ecosystem C. balance is required for the survival of an ecosystem D. one way to determine an ecosystems health is by its biodiversity E. predators play a role in balancing the earths ecosystems F. health ecosystems can support an unlimited number of plant and animal species (SELECT ALL THAT APPLY)

B. people's actions sometimes improve the health of an ecosystem
C. balance is required for the survival of an ecosystem
D. one way to determine an ecosystem's health is by its biodiversity
E. predators play a role in balancing the Earth's ecosystems
compare the physical features of canada with california. in what ways are they thr same and are they different in only 50 words

Canada and California have contrasting physical features. Both regions have diverse landscapes, including mountains, forests, and coastlines. Canada is known for its colder climate with vast forests, while California has a warmer climate and features deserts and beaches. They both offer a variety of outdoor recreational opportunities but differ in their climate and vegetation.
these problems are likely the result of urbanization A. earthquakes B. water shortages C. increased biodiversity D. air pollution E. increased population growth F. housing shortages

B. water shortages
D. air pollution
F. housing shortages

why is panamas geographic location important A. it is the lagrest country is central america B. it is the worlds leading supplier of oil C. it is an important trading route D. it connectd the continents of north and south america E. it controls the panama canal

C. it is an important trading route
D. it connects the continents of North and South America
E. it controls the Panama Canal
climatologists, biologsts, and geologsts conduct studies in this area which does NOT belong to any nation
Antarctica
these factors determine population growth A. death rate B. birth rate C. migration patterns D. trade agreements E. climate change

A. death rate
B. birth rate
C. migration patterns
describe something you can do to protect the environment in only 50 words

One way to protect the environment is by reducing waste and recycling materials. By properly disposing of items and recycling whenever possible, we can minimize the amount of waste ending up in landfills and reduce our overall impact on the environment, promoting sustainability and a healthier planet for future generations.
what are the names of the three regions that comprise oceania A. polynesia B. melanesia C. caledonia D. australasia E. maldives F. icronesia

A. Polynesia
B. Melanesia
F. Micronesia
which of the following are influenced by the earths physical features A. birth order B. methods of transportation C. occupations D. choice of clothing E. hair styles F. recreational activities

B. methods of transportation
C. occupations
D. choice of clothing
F. recreational activities
what practices can be used to protect the supply of freshwaster A. reduce biodiversity B. improve waste disposal procedures C. reduce dependence on pesticides and fertilizers D. increase conversation

B. improve waste disposal procedures
C. reduce dependence on pesticides and fertilizers
D. increase conservation
the pacific ring of fire is an area prone to
earthquakes and volcanic eruptions.
which factors threaten north america forests A. aquaifers B. organic farming C. overgazing D. offroad vehicle E. logging F. non native species G. wildifres

C. overgrazing
E. logging
F. non-native species
G. wildfires
these issues led to the poliitcal revolts in south america A. economic restrictions B. slavery C. emigration D. injustice ( select all that apply 0

A. economic restrictions
D. injustice
the indigenous population of australia is called A. aborigine B. melanesian C. maori D. lapita
A. Aborigine
in which type of economy do people grow crops for their own use A. mixed B. traditional C. market D. command
B. traditional
queen elizabeth 2 is the symbolic head of state in which nations A. new zealdn B. indoensia C. australia D. federated states of micronesia E. french polynesia G. papua new guinea

A. New Zealand 
C. Australia
G. Papua New Guinea
geographers consider these factors in their study of human geography A. climate patterns B. ethinicty C. traditions D. religion E. language F. elevations

B. ethnicity
C. traditions
D. religion
E. language
